changelog:
Talken 1.6

✨ New:
- Redesigned sign up & log in with a cleaner, modern look.
- Verification codes are now sent from Talken's own servers — faster and more secure.
- Clearer, step-by-step sign up with helpful inline messages.

🔒 Security:
- Your login details are now stored encrypted on your device.
- Your account key is encrypted before it ever leaves your device.

🔧 Improvements:
- Instant, no-freeze sign in and messaging.
- Automatic identity self-heal so people can always reach you.

📝 Notes:
Thanks for using Talken!
